ddls:
CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the retail location */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the retail location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude coordinate of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude coordinate of the location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Street address of the location */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the location is situated */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the location is situated */,
  "zip" TEXT /* Zip code of the location */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the location */,
  "opening_date" TEXT /* Date the location opened */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_locations_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., Toy / Game Store) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent category (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_data" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales record */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location associated with the sales data */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the sales record */,
  "total_sales" REAL /* Total sales amount for the day */,
  "total_transactions" INTEGER /* Total number of transactions for the day */,
  "average_sale_amount" REAL /* Average amount per sale */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_data_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "foot_traffic" (
  "traffic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each foot traffic record */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location associated with the foot traffic data */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the foot traffic record */,
  "people_count" INTEGER /* Number of people recorded at the location on that date */,
  "peak_hours" INTEGER /* Peak hours of foot traffic */,
  "off_peak_hours" INTEGER /* Off-peak hours of foot traffic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("traffic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_foot_traffic_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., store manager, regional manager, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hash of the user's password */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the location data */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time of access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_locations_access_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location the report is about */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., sales, foot traffic, inventory) */,
  "generated_by" TEXT /* User who generated the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location associated with the feedback */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer providing feedback */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date of the feedback entry */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments from the customer */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the customer (e.g., 1-5) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "promotions" (
  "promotion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each promotion */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location offering the promotion */,
  "promotion_details" TEXT /* Details about the promotion */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the promotion */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the promotion */,
  "discount_percentage" INTEGER /* Discount percentage offered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("promotion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_promotions_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory item */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the item is available */,
  "item_name" TEXT /* Name of the inventory item */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the item available */,
  "restock_date" TEXT /* Date the item was last restocked */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Reorder level for the item */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier for the item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis entry */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location associated with the analysis */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date of the analysis */,
  "sales_trend" TEXT /* Trend in sales (e.g., increasing, steady, decreasing) */,
  "traffic_trend" TEXT /* Trend in foot traffic (e.g., increasing, steady, decreasing) */,
  "inventory_level" TEXT /* Level of inventory (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_locations_analysis_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "location_photos" (
  "photo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each photo */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location associated with the photo */,
  "photo_url" TEXT /* URL of the photo */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the photo was uploaded */,
  "caption" TEXT /* Caption for the photo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("photo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_location_photos_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "location_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location hosting the event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "event_time" TEXT /* Time of the event */,
  "event_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the event (in minutes) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_location_events_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "address" TEXT /* Street address of the supplier */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the supplier is situated */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the supplier is situated */,
  "zip" TEXT /* Zip code of the supplier */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the supplier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the department is situated */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department (e.g., toys, electronics) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_departments_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employees" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the employee works */,
  "employee_name" TEXT /* Name of the employee */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the employee */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date the employee was hired */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payroll" (
  "payroll_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payroll entry */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee receiving the payroll */,
  "pay_date" TEXT /* Date of the payroll */,
  "gross_pay" REAL /* Gross pay for the payroll period */,
  "net_pay" REAL /* Net pay for the payroll period */,
  "taxes" REAL /* Taxes withheld for the payroll period */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payroll_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payroll_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "benefits" (
  "benefit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each benefit */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee receiving the benefit */,
  "benefit_name" TEXT /* Name of the benefit (e.g., health insurance) */,
  "benefit_description" TEXT /* Description of the benefit */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the benefit */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the benefit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("benefit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_benefits_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)
